title: Wave2 G1+G6:收尾文案全过 t()(Done!/succeeded/skipped/failed/All steps...)+ 总结卡 B-横线标题 + 单一「下一步 →」锚点
description: Fix G1 (English leaks in the summary card) and G6 (diverging footer). Move every hardcoded English string in ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts through t() with both en + zh-CN keys: `Done!` (renderComplete), the count words `succeeded`/`skipped`/`failed` and `All steps completed successfully` / `N step(s) failed` / `N/N steps completed` (buildSummaryBlock). Reshape renderSummaryCard to use the new B-横线 headerRule (TASK-001) instead of sectionBar, and replace the multi-line guidance footer with a SINGLE '下一步 →' golden-action anchor (the verbose capability table only under --verbose).
action: Add i18n keys to BOTH packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts and zh-CN.ts: `cli.summary.done` (en 'Done!' / zh '完成!'), `cli.summary.count.succeeded`/`.skipped`/`.failed`, `cli.summary.all-ok` ('All steps completed successfully' / '全部步骤已完成'), `cli.summary.n-failed` ('{count} step(s) failed'), `cli.summary.n-of-total` ('{done}/{total} steps completed'). renderComplete() → this.renderStatus(t('cli.summary.done'),'success'). buildSummaryBlock: replace the three literal count cells and the summaryLine ternary with t() calls. renderSummaryCard: replace sectionBar(summary.title) with headerRule(summary.title) from tui/structure.ts. Guidance footer: collapse install guidance.stage's multi-line `cli.install.next-steps` into a single anchor line keyed `cli.install.next-step.anchor` ('下一步 → {action}') printed once; gate the capability list behind --verbose.

criteria: ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts does NOT contain the literal 'All steps completed successfully' (grep -F returns no match)
ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts does NOT contain the literal 'Done!' (grep -F returns no match)
ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts buildSummaryBlock does NOT contain the literals ' succeeded', ' skipped', ' failed' as English words (the count cells are t() calls)
en.ts AND zh-CN.ts both define 'cli.summary.done', 'cli.summary.all-ok', 'cli.summary.count.succeeded', 'cli.summary.count.skipped', 'cli.summary.count.failed' (grep each key in both files)
renderSummaryCard uses headerRule (grep 'headerRule' in ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts), not sectionBar, for the summary title
install guidance prints a single '下一步'/'Next →' anchor key (en.ts + zh-CN.ts define 'cli.install.next-step.anchor'); the multi-line list is --verbose-gated
[UI-observable] running `fabric install` under zh-CN locale shows a Chinese summary card (no stray 'succeeded'/'Done!') ending in one '下一步 →' line
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test exits 0 (locale-parity.test.ts passes — keys present in both locales)
pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit exits 0 && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test exits 0
convergence.verification: grep -F 'All steps completed successfully' packages/cli/src/tui/ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts (expect empty); grep the new keys in both locale files; pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test (locale parity) && cli test.
convergence.definition_of_done: The install/uninstall summary card and completion line are fully localized (no hardcoded English), the card title uses the B-横线 primitive, and the footer is a single '下一步 →' anchor with the capability list behind --verbose.

files.change: Add cli.summary.done='Done!', cli.summary.all-ok='All steps completed successfully', cli.summary.n-failed='{count} step(s) failed', cli.summary.n-of-total='{done}/{total} steps completed', cli.summary.count.succeeded/.skipped/.failed='succeeded'/'skipped'/'failed', cli.install.next-step.anchor='Next → {action}'.
Add the SAME keys with zh-CN values (完成! / 全部步骤已完成 / {count} 个步骤失败 / {done}/{total} 步已完成 / 成功·跳过·失败 / 下一步 → {action}).
renderComplete uses t('cli.summary.done'); buildSummaryBlock count cells + summaryLine use the new t() keys; renderSummaryCard uses headerRule(summary.title). Import t from ../i18n.js.
Print a single cli.install.next-step.anchor line; gate the existing multi-line cli.install.next-steps list behind a --verbose check.

implementation: Add the six+ keys to en.ts and zh-CN.ts (keep the tables sorted/grouped consistently).
Refactor renderComplete + buildSummaryBlock + renderSummaryCard in ConsoleOutputRenderer to t() + headerRule.
Refactor guidance.stage.ts to one anchor line + --verbose capability list.
Update affected snapshot tests (summary card now Chinese-or-English by locale; assert via t() keys not literals).

success_metrics: no English literals in summary path

reference.pattern: existing t() usage in pipeline.ts buildSummary (title uses t('cli.install.pipeline.complete')); locale tables in en.ts/zh-CN.ts

rationale.chosen_approach: Route every leaked string through the existing t() + dual-locale tables; locale-parity.test.ts is the deterministic gate that both locales carry the key.
decision_factors: G1 root cause is hardcoded English in ConsoleOutputRenderer
G6 needs one anchor not a发散 list

risks: Forgetting a key in one locale → locale-parity.test.ts fails (intended gate).
